blocks.text: Joseph Palmer -- copying Kelly Snyder and Joseph Walker.

Intake is closed. Every matter in the Keith-Duarte portfolio that {{fact:f:E-2021-001.client}} transferred to us is now docketed against the papers in its own wrapper, and the confirmation schedule went to you last week listing each date and what we calculated it from. Two of our dates fall earlier than the ones on the transferred sheet. We are working to ours. If prior counsel disagrees, we would like the basis this month rather than nearer the date.

Kelly Snyder is through the file histories on the first two families and is drafting the memorandum on what the earlier arguments constrain. It will be longer than you want and shorter than the record deserves. Joseph Walker has the office action due in this cycle; you will get the draft response with a short note on the one election question we think is genuinely open, and it is open, not rhetorical.

One ask. We still do not have assignment recordation confirmed for two of the transferred matters. We would rather resolve that now than find it in a diligence request later, when it stops being paperwork and starts being a question about title. If your records show the recordation was made, send us the reel and frame and we will stop asking. If they do not, tell us that instead and we will handle it; an unrecorded assignment is a small problem this month and a larger one at any point after.
